message:
feat(runtime,server): implement real CLIENT PAUSE with command blocking

CLIENT PAUSE now actually blocks command processing:
- Stores pause deadline (ms) and mode (ALL/WRITE) in ServerState
- Server event loop checks is_command_paused() before execute_frame()
- ALL mode: blocks all commands from non-admin clients
- WRITE mode: blocks only write commands (reads continue)
- Auto-unpauses when deadline expires
- CLIENT UNPAUSE clears the pause state immediately
- CLIENT PAUSE 0 is equivalent to UNPAUSE

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
